items.title: Enhance Authorization Management UI in Frontend Web 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces a new application authorization management UI, accessible via the `ENABLE_APPLICATION_AUTHORIZATION` feature flag. Key additions include a dedicated route for authorization management, user search capabilities, and CRUD operations for authorizations. The UI enhancements aim to streamline the authorization process for users and improve overall application management.

items.title: Fix Dockerfile to Copy Only server.py in Platform Service 🚀
items.summary: The Dockerfile has been updated to explicitly copy only the server.py file, addressing an issue with a corrupted previous build. This change improves clarity and ensures that only the necessary file is included in the Docker image. The adjustment enhances the reliability of the build process.
